name: storybuilder

metadata.name: storybuilder
metadata.summary: A Python toolkit to build story meta.

documentation:
# StoryBuilder

Toolkit to build a story meta

# Pre-requisites

Run below command in console:

> python3 -m pip install -r requirements.txt

# Import package

> from storybuilder import Story

functions.name: storybuilder.utility.has_chinese_char
documentation:
Checks if a string contains at least one Chinese character.

Args:
    text: The string to be checked.

Returns:
    True if the string contains at least one Chinese character, False otherwise.

functions.name: storybuilder.utility.update_object
documentation:
Updates the original object from the update object.

Args:
    original: The object to be updated.
    update: The object containing updates.

Returns:
    A new object with the updates applied. Ignore if update is None.

functions.name: storybuilder.utility.retrieve_element_text
documentation: Extract all text recursively, excluding script and style tags

functions.name: storybuilder.utility.merge_dicts
documentation:
Merges two dictionaries recursively, handling different structures.

Args:
    dict1: The first dictionary.
    dict2: The second dictionary.

Returns:
    A new dictionary with merged key-value pairs.

modules.name: svgutils.cos_downloader
documentation: -*- coding=utf-8

functions.name: svgutils.cos_downloader.update_cos_files
documentation:
更新COS中的文件

Args:
    local_files (list): 本地文件路径列表
    cos_client: COS客户端实例
    bucket (str): 存储桶名称
    base_path (str): 基础路径，用于从本地路径中提取目标路径
    confirm (bool): 是否需要确认每个文件的更新

Returns:
    tuple: (成功数量, 失败数量, 失败文件列表)

functions.name: svgutils.cos_downloader.get_cos_client
documentation:
获取COS客户端实例

Returns:
    CosS3Client: COS客户端实例

functions.name: svgutils.cos_downloader.get_bucket_name
documentation:
获取存储桶名称

Returns:
    str: 存储桶名称

classes.name: svgutils.cos_downloader.COSDownloader

methods.name: svgutils.cos_downloader.COSDownloader.__init__
documentation:
初始化COS下载器

Args:
    client: CosS3Client实例

methods.name: svgutils.cos_downloader.COSDownloader.list_files
documentation:
列出存储桶中的文件

Args:
    bucket (str): 存储桶名称，格式为 BucketName-APPID
    prefix (str): 要列出的目录前缀
    delimiter (str): 分隔符，用于列出特定目录

Returns:
    list: 文件信息列表

methods.name: svgutils.cos_downloader.COSDownloader.download_file
documentation:
下载单个文件

Args:
    bucket (str): 存储桶名称，格式为 BucketName-APPID
    key (str): 对象键，即文件路径
    local_path (str): 本地保存路径
    
Returns:
    bool: 下载是否成功

methods.name: svgutils.cos_downloader.COSDownloader.download_files
documentation:
下载指定前缀下的所有文件

Args:
    bucket (str): 存储桶名称，格式为 BucketName-APPID
    prefix (str): 要下载的目录前缀
    local_dir (str): 本地保存目录
    file_pattern (str, optional): 文件名匹配模式，如 "*.svg"
    
Returns:
    dict: 下载统计信息
用于从腾讯云COS下载文件的工具类

classes.name: svgutils.svgcompressor.SVGCompressor

methods.name: svgutils.svgcompressor.SVGCompressor._check_svgo_installation
documentation: 检查SVGO是否已安装

methods.name: svgutils.svgcompressor.SVGCompressor._install_svgo
documentation: 安装SVGO

methods.name: svgutils.svgcompressor.SVGCompressor._ensure_svgo
documentation: 确保SVGO可用

methods.name: svgutils.svgcompressor.SVGCompressor.compress_file
documentation:
压缩单个SVG文件

Args:
    input_path (str): 输入SVG文件路径
    output_path (str, optional): 输出SVG文件路径。如果未指定，将覆盖原文件
    
Returns:
    tuple: (是否成功, 原始大小, 压缩后大小)

methods.name: svgutils.svgcompressor.SVGCompressor.compress_folder
documentation:
压缩文件夹中的所有SVG文件

Args:
    input_folder (str): 输入文件夹路径
    output_folder (str, optional): 输出文件夹路径。如果未指定，将覆盖原文件
    recursive (bool): 是否递归处理子文件夹
    
Returns:
    dict: 压缩统计信息

methods.name: svgutils.svgcompressor.SVGCompressor._remove_whitespace
documentation: 递归移除元素间的空白文本

methods.name: svgutils.svgcompressor.SVGCompressor._create_path_hash
documentation: 创建路径的唯一标识
SVG文件压缩器，使用SVGO进行优化压缩

functions.name: svgutils.characterbuilder.extract_parts
documentation:
Extract body part and posture from filename.

Args:
    filename (str): Name of the SVG file
    
Returns:
    tuple: (body_part, posture) if found, (None, None) otherwise

functions.name: svgutils.characterbuilder.process_svg_files
documentation:
Process SVG files in the specified folder, modifying the class attribute
of the top-level <g> element to include both body part and posture.

Args:
    folder_path (str): Path to the folder containing SVG files

functions.name: svgutils.characterbuilder.get_body_parts_from_files
documentation:
Scan folder and organize SVG files by body part type.

Returns:
    dict: Dictionary with body parts as keys and lists of (filename, class_name) tuples as values

functions.name: svgutils.characterbuilder.remove_namespace_prefix
documentation:
Recursively remove namespace prefixes from element and its children.

Args:
    element: XML element to process

functions.name: svgutils.characterbuilder.extract_transform_values
documentation:
Extract translate values from transform attribute.

Args:
    transform_str (str): Transform attribute string
    
Returns:
    tuple: (x, y) translation values or (0, 0) if not found

functions.name: svgutils.characterbuilder.apply_transform_offset
documentation:
Apply offset to element's transform attribute.

Args:
    element: XML element
    x_offset (float): X offset to add
    y_offset (float): Y offset to add

functions.name: svgutils.characterbuilder.extract_g_content
documentation:
Extract the content of the top-level g element from an SVG file.

Returns:
    str: The g element and its contents as a string

functions.name: svgutils.characterbuilder.generate_full_body_combinations
documentation:
Generate all possible combinations of body parts into full body SVG files.

Args:
    folder_path (str): Path to the folder containing individual body part SVG files
    character_name (str): Prefix to use for generated files
    output_folder (str): Optional separate output folder path

functions.name: svgutils.characterbuilder.calculate_new_size
documentation:
Calculate new dimensions maintaining aspect ratio based on target height.

Args:
    width (float): Original width
    height (float): Original height
    target_height (float): Desired height
    
Returns:
    tuple: (new_width, new_height)

functions.name: svgutils.characterbuilder.get_svg_dimensions
documentation:
Extract width and height from SVG file.

Args:
    file_path (str): Path to SVG file
    
Returns:
    tuple: (width, height) or None if not found

functions.name: svgutils.characterbuilder.build_character_tsx
documentation:
Build character TSX file with figure dimensions.

Args:
    folder_path (str): Path to the folder containing SVG files
    character_name (str): Character name prefix
    output_folder (str): Optional output folder path

functions.name: svgutils.characterbuilder.extract_paths
documentation:
提取SVG中的所有路径元素

Args:
    root: SVG的根元素
    
Returns:
    list: 路径元素列表的深拷贝

functions.name: svgutils.characterbuilder.apply_paths
documentation:
将源SVG文件中的路径应用到匹配模式的所有文件上

Args:
    source_path (str): 源SVG文件路径
    pattern (str): 目标文件匹配模
    layer_position (str): 'top' 或 'bottom'，决定新路径添加的位置

classes.name: storybuilder.storybase.PostureInteraction
documentation: default interaction with actor posture

functions.name: svgutils.list_fonts.list_system_fonts
documentation:
列出系统中所有可用的字体名称

Returns:
    list: 字体名称列表

classes.name: svgutils.svgconverter.SVGConverter

methods.name: svgutils.svgconverter.SVGConverter.svg_to_png
documentation:
将SVG文件转换为PNG文件

Args:
    input_path (str): 输入SVG文件路径
    output_path (str, optional): 输出PNG文件路径。如果未指定，将使用相同文件名但扩展名改为.png
    scale (float): 输出图像的缩放比例
    background_color (str, optional): 背景颜色，默认为None（透明）
    
Returns:
    bool: 转换是否成功

methods.name: svgutils.svgconverter.SVGConverter.convert_folder
documentation:
转换文件夹中的所有SVG文件为PNG

Args:
    input_folder (str): 输入文件夹路径
    output_folder (str, optional): 输出文件夹路径。如果未指定，将在原文件夹中创建PNG文件
    recursive (bool): 是否递归处理子文件夹
    scale (float): 输出图像的缩放比例
    background_color (str, optional): 背景颜色，默认为None（透明）
    
Returns:
    dict: 转换���计信息
SVG文件转换器，支持SVG转PNG

modules.name: svgutils.svg_text_updater
documentation: !/usr/bin/env python3
-*- coding: utf-8 -*-

functions.name: svgutils.svg_text_updater.process_files
documentation: Process multiple files with given command

methods.name: svgutils.svg_text_updater.SVGTextProcessor.merge_text_elements
documentation:
Merge text elements with same attributes and close x positions

Args:
    svg_path: Path to SVG file
    output_path: Output path (optional)
    max_x_offset: Maximum gap between text elements to merge (default: 200)

methods.name: svgutils.svg_text_updater.SVGTextProcessor.update_font
documentation: Update font family for text elements

methods.name: svgutils.svg_text_updater.SVGTextProcessor.set_text_anchor
documentation:
Set text-anchor to middle

Args:
    svg_path: Path to SVG file
    output_path: Output path (optional)

methods.name: svgutils.svg_text_updater.SVGTextProcessor.align_text
documentation:
Align text elements horizontally to center

Args:
    svg_path: Path to SVG file
    output_path: Output path (optional)

methods.name: svgutils.svg_text_updater.SVGTextProcessor.center_text
documentation:
Center text elements by both anchor and position

Args:
    svg_path: Path to SVG file
    output_path: Output path (optional)

methods.name: svgutils.svg_text_updater.SVGTextProcessor.clean_svg
documentation:
Clean SVG file by removing XML declaration, defs elements and clip-path attributes

Args:
    svg_path: Path to SVG file
    output_path: Output path (optional)

functions.name: svgutils.svgtransform.extract_translate_values
documentation:
只提取 translate 变换值，忽略其他变换

Args:
    transform_str (str): Transform 属性字符串
    
Returns:
    tuple: (tx, ty) 平移值 或 None

functions.name: svgutils.svgtransform.find_g_element
documentation:
Find g element with or without namespace.

Args:
    root: Root element of the SVG
    
Returns:
    element: First g element found or None

functions.name: svgutils.svgtransform.remove_namespace_prefix
documentation:
Remove namespace prefixes from all elements and attributes.

Args:
    root: Root element of the XML tree

functions.name: svgutils.svgtransform.format_number
documentation:
格式化数字，保留两位小数并移除尾随的零

Args:
    num (float): 要格式化的数字
    
Returns:
    str: 格式化后的数字字符串

functions.name: svgutils.svgtransform.format_path_data
documentation:
格式化路径数据，移除命令字母周围的空格

Args:
    path_data (str): 原始路径数据
    
Returns:
    str: 格式化后的路径数据

functions.name: svgutils.svgtransform.process_element
documentation: 处理单个元素的变换

functions.name: svgutils.svgtransform.remove_duplicate_paths
documentation:
移除重复的路径元素，保留最上层的路径

Args:
    root: SVG的根元素

functions.name: svgutils.svgtransform.process_g_elements
documentation:
处理SVG中的g元素

Args:
    root: SVG根元素

functions.name: svgutils.svgtransform.apply_translate_from_g
documentation:
Extracts translate transform from all <g> elements and applies them to child elements.
Handles SVG files with or without namespace.

Args:
    svg_path (str): Path to input SVG file
    output_path (str): Path where modified SVG will be saved

functions.name: svgutils.svgtransform.process_folder
documentation:
Process all SVG files in a folder.

Args:
    input_folder (str): Input folder path
    output_folder (str, optional): Output folder path. If not provided, will overwrite input files
    recursive (bool): Whether to process subfolders recursively

Returns:
    dict: Processing statistics

functions.name: svgutils.svgtransform.process_folder_with_action
documentation:
通用的文件夹处理函数

Args:
    input_folder (str): 输入文件夹路径
    output_folder (str): 输出文件夹路径
    recursive (bool): 是否递归处理子文件夹
    action_func (callable): 处理单个文件的函数

functions.name: svgutils.svgtransform.print_stats
documentation: 打印处理统计信息

functions.name: svgutils.svgtransform.circle_to_path
documentation:
将圆形转换为SVG路径命令

Args:
    cx (float): 圆心x坐标
    cy (float): 圆心y坐标
    r (float): 半径
    
Returns:
    str: SVG路径数据

functions.name: svgutils.svgtransform.convert_circle_to_path
documentation:
将circle元素转换为等效的path元素

Args:
    element: circle元素
    
Returns:
    element: 新的path元素

functions.name: svgutils.svgtransform.convert_circles
documentation:
换SVG中的所有circle元素为path元素

Args:
    root: SVG的根元素

functions.name: svgutils.svgtransform.find_parent_and_index
documentation:
找元素的父元素和它在父元素中的索引

Args:
    root: XML树的根元素
    element: 要查找的元素
    
Returns:
    tuple: (parent_element, index) 或 (None, -1)

functions.name: svgutils.svgtransform.flatten_nested_g
documentation:
递归处理嵌套的g元素，合并变换并移除不必要的g元素

Args:
    element: 当前处理的元��
    root: SVG的根元素
    parent_tx: 父元素的x变换值
    parent_ty: 父元素的y变换值

functions.name: svgutils.svgtransform.extract_paths
documentation:
提取SVG中的所有路径元素

Args:
    root: SVG的根元素
    
Returns:
    list: 路径元素列表的深拷贝

functions.name: svgutils.svgtransform.apply_paths
documentation:
将源SVG文件中的路径应用到匹配模式的所有文件上

Args:
    source_path (str): 源SVG文件路径
    pattern (str): 目标文件匹配模
    layer_position (str): 'top' 或 'bottom'，决定新路径添加的位置

functions.name: svgutils.svgtransform.convert_circles_to_paths
documentation: 将SVG文件中的圆形转换为路径

functions.name: svgutils.svgtransform.get_transform_matrix
documentation:
Extract matrix values from transform string

Args:
    transform_str: Transform attribute string
    
Returns:
    list: Matrix values [a, b, c, d, e, f] or None

functions.name: svgutils.svgtransform.combine_matrices
documentation:
Combine two transformation matrices

Args:
    matrix1: First matrix [a1, b1, c1, d1, e1, f1]
    matrix2: Second matrix [a2, b2, c2, d2, e2, f2]
    
Returns:
    list: Combined matrix [a, b, c, d, e, f]

functions.name: svgutils.svgtransform.get_accumulated_transform
documentation:
Get accumulated transform matrix from element and all its ancestors

Args:
    element: XML element
    
Returns:
    list: Accumulated matrix [a, b, c, d, e, f] or None

functions.name: svgutils.svgtransform.apply_transform_to_path
documentation: Apply transform attributes to path data and remove transforms

methods.name: storybuilder.storybuilder.Page.addHtml
documentation:
Set HTML content for the page

Args:
    html (Union[str, dict]): HTML content as string or multilingual dict
    rect (list, optional): Position and size of the HTML content. Defaults to None.

methods.name: storybuilder.storybuilder.Page.updateHtml
documentation:
Update HTML content at specified position in contentList

Args:
    pos (int): Position in contentList to update
    html (Union[str, dict]): New HTML content as string or multilingual dict
    rect (list, optional): New position and size of the HTML content. Defaults to None.
    
Returns:
    bool: True if update successful, False otherwise

methods.name: storybuilder.storybuilder.Page.removeHtml
documentation:
Remove HTML content at specified position in contentList

Args:
    pos (int): Position in contentList to remove
    
Returns:
    bool: True if removal successful, False otherwise

inner_classes.name: storybuilder.storybuilder.ExamPage.InitInteraction
documentation: onResult: -2

inner_classes.name: storybuilder.storybuilder.ExamPage.ErrorInteraction
documentation: onResult: -1

inner_classes.name: storybuilder.storybuilder.ExamPage.SuccessInteraction
documentation: popup = 2, onResult: self.correctAnswerId
